name: Blackbaud Raiser's Edge NXT API
what_it_does: Blackbaud Raiser's Edge NXT REST API for enterprise nonprofit donor management and major gift fundraising. Enables AI agents to manage constituent and donor record management for enterprise nonprofit CRM, handle gift processing and campaign management for major gift fundraising, access prospect research and wealth analytics for development officer portfolio management, retrieve solicitor assignment and relationship management for major gift fundraising operations, manage grant management and foundation prospect tracking for institutional fundraising, handle communication and action tracking for donor stewardship workflow, access event management and registration for major donor events, retrieve analytics and KPI dashboards for advancement operations, manage planned giving tracking and bequest stewardship, and integrate Raiser's Edge NXT data with NXT financial reporting, event management, and CRM platforms.
use_cases: Managing major gift prospects from development officer agents
Processing gifts from donor relations agents
Assigning solicitors from advancement operations agents
Analyzing fundraising performance from advancement analytics agents
not_for: Small nonprofits without enterprise fundraising scale
Peer-to-peer fundraising without major gift focus
Annual fund-only nonprofits without major gift management requirements
best_when: A large nonprofit, university, or hospital foundation using Raiser's Edge NXT wants AI agents to automate constituent management, gift processing, prospect research, solicitor assignments, and fundraising analytics.
avoid_when: DONOR RELATIONS RISK: Major gift fundraising is highly relationship-driven — automated AI outreach to major gift prospects ($100K+ capacity) without development officer review creates donor relationship damage. Blackbaud SKY API is well-documented but has complex constituent/gift object relationships; incorrect data modeling creates duplicate records and reporting errors. Blackbaud suffered a major data breach (2020) affecting 13,000+ nonprofits; verify current security posture and SOC 2 attestation.

auth.notes: Raiser's Edge NXT uses OAuth 2.0 via Blackbaud SKY API. Developer portal at developer.blackbaud.com. Webhooks for constituent and gift events. REST API with JSON. Charleston, South Carolina HQ (Blackbaud). Public (BLKB NASDAQ). Founded 1981. Raiser's Edge has been the enterprise nonprofit CRM standard for 30+ years. 45,000+ nonprofit customers (all Blackbaud products). RE NXT is the cloud version of Raiser's Edge. Competes with Salesforce Nonprofit and Microsoft Dynamics for enterprise nonprofit CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; enterprise and university pricing tiers
pricing.notes: Charleston, SC. Blackbaud (BLKB NASDAQ). Founded 1981. 45,000+ nonprofit customers. Raiser's Edge NXT cloud CRM. Competes with Salesforce Nonprofit Success Pack and Microsoft Dynamics for enterprise nonprofit. Strong in higher education, healthcare, and social service fundraising.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; SKY API documented limits

known_agent_gotchas: DONOR RELATIONS RISK: Automated major gift prospect outreach without development officer review creates relationship damage; major gift prospect management requires human relationship management judgment
Blackbaud 2020 data breach legacy — Blackbaud suffered significant data breach in 2020 affecting 13,000+ nonprofits; verify current security posture and SIEM/detection improvements
Constituent duplicate management — RE NXT constituent deduplication is complex; automated constituent creation without deduplication check creates duplicate records and data quality issues
Gift split and attribution — automated gift processing must handle split gifts, matching gifts, pledges, and tribute attribution correctly; incorrect attribution creates donor recognition errors
SKY API rate limits — Blackbaud SKY API has per-minute and daily rate limits; high-volume data migration or integration must respect documented rate limits
Prospect research data enrichment — automated wealth screening integration requires careful data governance; high-capacity prospect data is sensitive and enrichment must respect constituent privacy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise nonprofit CRM. SOC2, ISO27001, PCI-DSS. OAuth2/SKY API. US/EU. Donor and fundraising data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise nonprofit CRM. SOC2, ISO27001, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US/EU. Donor and financial data.
